case_title: MANUEL GARCIA OROZCO VS. ERIKA ANN SLOAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,200.00 FILED BY OROZCO, MANUEL GARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT SLOAN, ERIKA ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OROZCO, MANUEL GARCIA SLOAN, ERIKA ANN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. 506 PLAINTIFF MANUEL GARCIA OROZCO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE #300563. DEFENDANT ERIKA ANN SLOAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SLOAN, ERIKA ANN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 WAIVER) SERVED MAY-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SLOAN, ERIKA ANN

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OROZCO, MANUEL GARCIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OROZCO, MANUEL GARCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SLOAN, ERIKA ANN $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,600.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT WAS MORE LIKELY THAN NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE COLLISION. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $2,500.00 FOR THE COST OF HIS CAR, $300 FOR THE GARAGE FEE, AND $800 IN LOST WAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
